# SMS Marketing Strategies: Tips & Examples

Webinar

# SMS Marketing Strategies: Tips & Examples

January 25, 2023

60 minutes

On demand

## Description

SMS enables near real-time connection and engagement at massive scale, making it a truly invaluable medium for brands—but only if it’s done well.

Text messaging comes with a lot of nuance and complexity, so marketers’ foray into SMS/MMS must be intentional, focused, and well-planned. In this webinar, we’ll provide step-by-step guidance for building an effective SMS program to delight customers and supercharge acquisition, loyalty, and revenue.

**You’ll come away with:**

Deep perspective on how to incorporate SMS into your cross-channel strategy

Best practices for launching, managing, and optimizing an SMS program that’s catered to your organization’s—and your customers’—specific needs

Tactical guidance on navigating setup, deliverability & compliance, growing your user base, setting KPIs, and proving the overall ROI of the channel
